hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -t 0 ]; then exit 0; fi; FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; REPO="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; case "$FILE" in "$REPO"/bff/*.java) (cd "$REPO/bff" && ./mvnw spotless:apply -q) || true ;; "$REPO"/business-service/*.java) (cd "$REPO/business-service" && ./mvnw spotless:apply -q) || true ;; *.java) echo "[hook] Java file outside repo bff/business-service: $FILE" >&2 ;; "$REPO"/frontend/*.ts|"$REPO"/frontend/*.tsx|"$REPO"/frontend/*.vue|"$REPO"/frontend/*.js|"$REPO"/frontend/*.jsx) (cd "$REPO/frontend" && npx --no-install prettier --write "$FILE") || true ;; esac; exit 0'
